exec: //Function to validate keys available in Json Response
pm.test("'"+expected+"' key should be available in response", function () {
//Function to assert Json value with the expected value
jsonValueCheck("Expecting status code to be 200", pm.response.code, 200);
jsonValueCheck("The response should be a JSON", typeof(jsonData), 'object');

jsonValueCheck("The number of groups available in the response should be >= 6", jsonData.data.relationships.administeredGroups.data.length >= 6, true);
jsonValueCheck("The value of key administeredGroups[data].type should be 'groups'", groupTypeArray.every("groups"), true);
jsonValueCheck("The number of campaigns available in the response should be 6", jsonData.data.relationships.administeredCampaigns.data.length >= 6, true);
jsonValueCheck("The value of key administeredCampaigns[data].type should be 'campaigns'", campaignTypeArray.every("campaigns"), true);
jsonValueCheck("The number of companies available in the response should be 6", jsonData.data.relationships.administeredCompanies.data.length >= 6, true);
//Verify that the value of "administeredCompanies[data][i][type]" key is "companies"
jsonValueCheck("The value of key administeredCompanies[data].type should be 'companies'", companyTypeArray.every("companies"), true);
jsonValueCheck("The number of beneficiaries available in the response should be 6", jsonData.data.relationships.administeredBeneficiaries.data.length >= 6, true);
jsonValueCheck("The value of key administeredBeneficiaries[data].type should be 'beneficiaries'", beneficiaryTypeArray.every("beneficiaries"), true);
jsonValueCheck("The number of beneficiary admin roles should be 6", jsonData.data.relationships.beneficiaryAdminRoles.data.length >=6, true);
jsonValueCheck("The number of company admin roles should be 6", jsonData.data.relationships.companyAdminRoles.data.length >= 6, true);
jsonValueCheck("The donor role user id should be the active role as the user is of type donor", jsonData.data.relationships.activeRole.data.id, donorUserId);
jsonValueCheck("Verifying that the user is not a chimp admin", jsonData.data.relationships.chimpAdminRole.data, null);
jsonValueCheck("The donor role user id should be present in the last object under included array", jsonData.included[jsonData.included.length - 1].id, donorUserId);
//Number of objects in included array should be 37
//7 groups + 7 campaigns + 7 companies + 7 beneficiaries + 7 beneficiaryadminrole + 7 companyadminrole + 1active role
jsonValueCheck("The number of objects in included array under response should be 37", jsonData.included.length, 37);
jsonValueCheck("The group id's retrieved in the response should match the group id's in included array", actualGroupIdArray, groupIdArray);
jsonValueCheck("The following group names "+groupNameArray+" should match the group names in included array", actualGroupNameArray, groupNameArray);
jsonValueCheck("The following group slugs "+groupSlugArray+" should match the group slugs in included array", actualGroupSlugArray, groupSlugArray);

jsonValueCheck("The following campaign names "+campaignNameArray+" should match the campaign names in the included array", actualcampaignNameArray, campaignNameArray);
jsonValueCheck("The following campaign slugs "+campaignSlugArray+" should match the campaign slugs in the included array", actualcampaignSlugArray, campaignSlugArray);
jsonValueCheck("The company id's retrieved in response should match the company id's in included array", actualCompanyIdArray, companyIdArray);
jsonValueCheck("The following company names "+companyNameArray+" should match the company name in included array", actualCompanyNameArray.sort(), companyNameArray.sort());
jsonValueCheck("The following company slugs "+companySlugArray+" should match the company slug in included array", actualCompanySlugArray.sort(), companySlugArray.sort());
jsonValueCheck("The beneficiary id's retrieved in response should match the beneficiary id's in included array", actualBeneficiaryIdArray, beneficiaryIdArray);
jsonValueCheck("The following beneficiary names "+beneficiaryNameArray+" should match the beneficiary name in included array", actualBeneficiaryNameArray, beneficiaryNameArray);
jsonValueCheck("The following beneficiary slugs "+beneficiarySlugArray+" should match the beneficiary slug in included array", actualBeneficiarySlugArray, beneficiarySlugArray);
jsonValueCheck("The beneficiary admin roles retrieved in response should match the beneficiary admin roles in the included array", actualBeneficiaryAdminRoleArray, beneficiaryAdminRoleArray);
jsonValueCheck("The company admin roles retrieved in response should match the company admin roles in the included array", actualCompanyAdminRoleArray, companyAdminRoleArray);
